name: create_announcement
description: Post a new announcement to a course that all enrolled students and instructors will see. Announcements appear on the course homepage and can trigger email notifications. Supports HTML content and file attachments.

parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: The ID of the course to post the announcement to.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The body content of the announcement (HTML allowed).
parameters.example: The midterm exam has been rescheduled to March 20th.

parameters.name: is_announcement
parameters.description: Must be set to true to create an announcement instead of a discussion topic.

parameters.name: delayed_post_at
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date to schedule the announcement for future posting.

body.title: Midterm Exam Schedule Change
body.message: The midterm exam has been rescheduled to March 20th.

body.title: Midterm Exam Schedule Change
body.message: The midterm exam has been rescheduled to March 20th.
